problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: If Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
